info.name: GCFast-MPTS API
info.description:
GFAST Teacher Membership Payment Tracking System — Full API Collection.

## Setup
1. Import this collection into Postman.
2. Create an **Environment** named `GCFast Local` with these variables:
   - `base_url` → `http://localhost:3000`
   - `supabase_url` → `https://YOUR_PROJECT_REF.supabase.co`
   - `supabase_anon_key` → your Supabase anon key
   - `access_token` → *(auto-filled by Login request)*
   - `treasurer_token` → *(auto-filled by Treasurer Login request)*
   - `member_id` → *(fill with a real member UUID after creating one)*
   - `member_member_id` → *(fill with the member UUID linked to a member-role user)*

## Auth Flow
Run **Login → Treasurer** or **Login → Member** first. The `access_token` variable is auto-set by the test script. All other requests use `Authorization: Bearer {{access_token}}`.

item.name: 0 — Auth (Supabase Direct)
item.description: Supabase auth endpoints called directly. Run one of these first to get an access_token.
